subcodes.first_line: Thy call was heard, and thy book attained unto the Most Holy Presence. Every soul that riseth up for God's sake in that moment attaineth His presence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ندایت شنیده شد کتابت بمنظر اطهر فائز گشت هر نفسیکه لله برآید در آنحین بمحضر
subcodes.subjects: @Word of God and human limitations, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
